reviews.comment:
35 minutos esperando que hagan el cambio de turno de las 14 hs. Los palyeros en una sala con aire acondicionado y afuera 35 grados de calor al sol, todos esperando, sin que atienda nadie. Una falta de respeto total.

(Translated by Google)
We waited 35 minutes for the 2 PM shift change. The players were in an air-conditioned room while it was 35 degrees Celsius outside in the sun, all waiting with no one attending to them. A total lack of respect.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCLXY3VFhnEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The gas stations in Puerto Iguazú have two prices for refueling: one for residents and one for tourists.

This one has a reasonable price, however, there is a cheaper one in front of the bus terminal.

(Original)
Os postos de Puerto Iguazú, contam com dois preços para abastecimento o valor para moradores e turistas.
Esse tem um preço razoável, contudo em frente ao terminal de ônibus tem um mais barato.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCc0xHa1lREAE
